meaning: n.失明,文盲,愚昧,轻举妄动,盲目性
examples: It causes blindness or serious loss of vision.
Blindness is a common complication of diabetes.
Early diagnosis and treatment can usually prevent blindness.
It is the leading cause of blindness in this country, in this age group by far.
What is worse is what their own morally relative blindness causes them to do.
